data.title: What's Going On With Sangamo Therapeutics Shares Tuesday?
data.description: Sangamo Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:SGMO) shares are moving higher Tuesday after the company announced the FDA approved an accelerated pathway for ST-920, a potential gene therapy for the treatment of Fabry disease.

Tencent's Delta Force: Hawk Ops Open Beta To Launch In December, Taking Aim At Call Of Duty
data.description: Delta Force: Hawk Ops' open beta launches December 5th for PC, offering new maps, modes, and tactical gameplay to rival major FPS titles.
